text:
### `InputFact` variants (each doc-comments the real writer it will replace)
- `SessionStarted{session_id, channel_h, agent_pubkey, pid, at}` → replaces `state::sessions::Store::register_session`/`upsert_session_row`
- `TurnStarted{session_id, at}` → replaces `set_working(id, working=true, turn_started_at)`
- `TranscriptWindowCaptured{session_id, window_hash, at}` → replaces `set_session_transcript` (carries hash, not text)
- `DistillCompleted{session_id, window_hash, title, activity, at}` → replaces `set_session_distill(id, title, activity, last_distill_at)`
- `TurnEnded{session_id, at}` → replaces `set_working(id, working=false, ..)`
- `RelayEventObserved{event_id, kind, channel_h, pubkey, at}` → replaces `state::events::Store::insert_event` (header fields only)
- `RelayPublishAccepted{local_id, event_id, accepted, at}` → replaces `outbox::Store::mark_published`/`mark_failed`
- `ProcessExited{session_id, pid, at}` → replaces the `runtime` `pid_alive` watcher calling `mark_dead`
- `ClockTick{at}` → replaces ad-hoc `now`/heartbeat reads in the runtime loop

Derives `Clone, Debug, PartialEq, Eq, Serialize, Deserialize`. Bulky payloads stay out — transcripts enter as `window_hash`, distillations as `title`/`activity`.
